caption: A young man with glasses and a black t-shirt stands on stage, gesturing as he speaks. He appears to be giving a presentation or lecture, possibly at a conference or educational event. As he talks, another man enters the frame from the right side, holding a microphone. The newcomer seems to be joining the first speaker, perhaps to ask a question or contribute to the discussion. The setting includes a projector screen in the background and a table with various items, suggesting a formal yet informal atmosphere. The interaction between the two men indicates a collaborative or interactive session.
